title: COA Submission Hub
subtitle: Collaborative project | Deployed and accessed through AdDU account
description: This project involves developing a secure web application that streamlines the submission and tracking of Commission on Audit (COA) forms within Ateneo de Davao University (AdDU). The platform provides an organized and user-friendly interface for managing submissions efficiently while ensuring secure access, proper processing, and institutional compliance through AdDU account authentication.

title: SAMAHAN Newsfeed
subtitle: Collaborative project | Deployed
description: This project involves developing a centralized newsfeed platform for SAMAHAN that allows students to access news articles, announcements, and school updates published by SAMAHAN members. The platform provides an organized and user-friendly interface that improves information dissemination and keeps the student body informed about campus events, activities, and important updates.

title: ADTO (Automated Crowd Monitoring System v2)
subtitle: Collaborative project | Deployed | Client-side
description: This project involves developing a centralized event management and crowd monitoring platform that allows administrators to manage events, update participant limits, and monitor ticket distribution efficiently. The system enables students to view upcoming and ongoing events, purchase tickets through HelixPay integration, and access event-related information through a user-friendly web application.

title: Badminton Court Management System
subtitle: Individual project | Not deployed
description: This project involves developing a mobile-based management system that enables badminton court owners to manage reservations, monitor player activities, and organize tournaments through a centralized platform. The application provides a user-friendly interface that streamlines scheduling, improves operational efficiency, and supports the overall management of badminton court services.
